message:
feat(audit): Add --limit flag to timeline command

Add optional event limiting to the audit timeline command:

- Add --limit/-n argument (default 100, 0 = unlimited)
- When limit is set, show only the N most recent events
- Use split_off() to efficiently trim older events

This prevents output overflow when viewing timelines with thousands
of events, while preserving the ability to see all events with -n 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
